title: Resolution Congratulating and Commending the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) Headed by Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino, Through the Efforts of Municipal Nutrition Action Office Headed by Ms. Madeleine M. Alforja, for Being Awarded As One of the 2021 Outstanding Nutrition Honor Award Performer to Be Awarded During the Conduct of the 2022 Calabarzon Regional Nutrition Awarding Ceremony (RNAC) on December 7, 2022 in Quezon City. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR MARK LESTER B. DIZON, 12/05/2022)
